description: The set's entity_type must equal the filter's input_entity_type.
A filter always outputs a derived set; type is determined by the filter.
An analysis row's inputs.sets[] declares which entity_types are accepted.
The layer's entity_type must accept the set's entity_type.
The analysis's input_layer_types must contain the layer_id.
The analysis's produces must contain the layer_id.
The hook's requires_layers OR optional_layers must contain the layer_id.
